title: deparia chinensis
intro: Deparia chinensis, also known as Chinese golden spleenwort or Chinese oxtongue fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia, characterized by its golden-yellow or reddish-brown scales on the underside of its fronds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Deparia chinensis include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Deparia chinensis is often prepared as a tea or used in herbal remedies, with the dried fronds being steeped in hot water to make a medicinal infusion.
